name: Yesil Yatirim Holding Anonim Sirketi
summary: Yesil Yatirim Holding Anonim Sirketi provides technical planning, programming, budgeting, project planning, and in relation to financial markets. The company is also involved in real estate valuation services, investment and research activities in the commercial, industrial, and financial areas. In addition, it offers company valuation services. The company is based in Istanbul, Turkey.
